title: Developers Plan
excerpt: Does monday provide free plans for developers to create apps? Free plan has no possibility to create something as it’s forbidden to use automations or integrations even if it’s custom app created by myself. As for now I …

posts.author: lays (A L)
posts.cookedHtml:
Does monday provide free plans for developers to create apps? Free plan has no possibility to create something as it’s forbidden to use automations or integrations even if it’s custom app created by myself. As for now I have to create new account every two weeks (free trial unlocks access to pro plan for 14 days) just to test my apps.

What about create Developers Plan which unlocks access to all features monday provides with some limitations, let’s say 1 user, 10 boards and 100 items per account?

posts.author: rob (Roberto Tremonti)
posts.cookedHtml:
Actually there’s a Developer plan.
Instructions on how to sign up for a free Developer account are available in documentation at
https://apps.developer.monday.com/docs/intro#start-building

posts.author: lays (A L)
posts.cookedHtml:
Oh, I didn’t see it, thanks!
Could you please tell me how does it differ from free plan? As I can see it doesn’t provide access to automations & integrations.

image2482×1054 177 KB

posts.author: rob (Roberto Tremonti)
posts.cookedHtml:
I don’t know the differences between the Free and the Developer plans.
AFAICS in my dev account I can install integrations and automations.

posts.author: lays (A L)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you! I’ve signed up for dev account but was forcibly switched to pro plan free trial. So I can check this out in two weeks.

posts.author: mpsujek (Mateusz)
posts.cookedHtml: That link is not working anymore here is an active one → Make your first request

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you @mpsujek for the update for the link!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: LillyBates (Lilly)
posts.cookedHtml: As far as I know, Monday doesn’t currently offer a specific plan for developers, which seems like a missed opportunity. Access to limited features like 1 user, 10 boards, and 100 items could make it easier for developers to build and test without compromising the integrity of the platform. Plus, this could potentially encourage more development, leading to a richer ecosystem of apps and integrations for everyone to benefit from.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @LillyBates,

Please send us an email to appsupport@monday.com explaining what you need and what you need to use this developer account for and we will take a look

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: LillyBates (Lilly)
posts.cookedHtml:
Lilly:

As far as I know, Monday doesn’t currently offer a specific plan for developers, which seems like a missed opportunity. Access to limited features like 1 user, 10 boards, and 100 items could make it easier for developers to build and test without compromising the integrity of the platform. Plus, this could potentially encourage more development, leading to a richer ecosystem of apps and integrations for everyone to benefit from.

By the way, have you considered integrating some AI into your Monday apps? https://jasper.studio/services/ai-for-business could add some interesting capabilities to your projects, like automation and analytics. It could be worth a look while you’re in the development phase.
